name: Crab Burgers
recipeIngredient: 1 bottle catsup or BBQ sauce, to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the eggs and catsup or BBQ sauce in a bowl until combined.
2. Add the crab meat to the egg mixture and stir until all ingredients are well incorporated.
3. Fold in half of the grated cheddar cheese, green onion, celery salt, onion salt, and garlic powder.
4. Season with additional sweet pickle juice if desired.
5. Divide the mixture evenly between hamburger bun halves.
6. Place under a broiler or grill until the patties are bubbly and lightly browned.
7. Serve hot.
